programme.title: Way of the Master
programme.desc: The Living Waters team takes the gospel to London during the Coronation of King Charles.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes S2

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist

programme.title: Bibleman

programme.title: Sea Kids

programme.title: Whirl

programme.title: Lessons from the Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids to follow along and get into God's Word!

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets. The Deditos series is produced in Guatemala by a multicultural team.

programme.title: Arise Kids

programme.desc: In Homestead, a 12 foot albino burmese python is on the loose eating anything in sight. It's eating the local cats and dogs and its next victim could be a small child.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: A suspect fleeing on the levee after dark puts wildlife agents in danger.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Untold Stories
programme.desc: Get the inside scoop on their recent trips to Indonesia and Australia, and find out how the cast handles hoaxers.

programme.title: Fish Or Die
programme.desc: The boys venture to a remote area controlled by the Dayak people of Borneo. While there, they are prepared to risk it all in order to catch the majestic and mighty mahseer fish.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet
programme.desc: Dr Dee embarks on her first flight as a new pilot to treat animals in the Arctic Circle. She also cares for an aging Border Collie and a disabled Siberian husky.

programme.title: My Pack Life
programme.desc: When Copper the sly and mighty Dachshund mix runs off again, Lee and Sonia embark on yet another mission to find his whereabouts. During their journey, they stumble upon his secret canine cave. Later, Sal the one-ton blind pig gets pampe...

programme.title: My Pack Life
programme.desc: Lee overcomes his history of foster fails by joining forces with Just to surprise his family with Chihuahua mix Minnie. Princess the Alpaca welcomes her new baby and the team dreams up ideas for the sanctuary.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: The countdown to winter continues as Heimo breaks ground on the new cabin, while Bob and his daughter embark on a river journey to the cabin where she was raised.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Tia, Tania and Mariah take a look back at the most adorable moments - from surprising rescues and teary reunions to parolee antics and heart-warming adoptions.

programme.title: Miami Animal Police
programme.desc: Exotic wildlife expert Bob Freer is called to a Homestead restaurant where some strange creatures have been seen running around on the land behind the property.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: Suspicious shotgun blasts on Catahoula Lake lead wildlife agents on a high-speed chase. A trail of beer cans point to a pair of hunters with multiple violations, and on the bayou, agents catch a lawbreaking crawfisherman.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Untold Stories
programme.desc: Follow the crew as Matt, Bobo, Ranae and Cliff investigate a new lead in Florida, for an upcoming episode.

programme.title: Fish Or Die
programme.desc: In Mexico, the crew navigate a maze of crocodile and mosquito-infested waterways and lagoons in search of a rumoured paradise for fishing tarpon.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: CEO of Zappos thinks his employees deserve a nap room! Wayde and Brett accept the challenge to create a 24 ft long tank with individual sleeping pods.

programme.title: Rugged Justice
programme.desc: While a salmon poacher is arrested in Seattle, a duck hunter with a criminal past is confronted. Plus, a trapped deer is finally freed from a storage compound.

programme.title: Miami Animal Police
programme.desc: Exotic wildlife expert Bob Freer is called to a Homestead restaurant where some strange creatures have been seen running around on the land behind the property.

programme.title: Little Giants
programme.desc: In the arid scrubland of Tinaja, New Mexico, Bradley and Billy track down the giant scolopendra centipede. Armed with venomous claws, it's a relentless killer.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Return To The Wilder...
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson and his crew plunge deep on a dangerous journey into the Costa Rican rainforest where they find Central America's most lethal pit viper.

programme.title: Dolphin Days
programme.desc: Life gets tough for the bottlenose dolphins in Florida after a neighbouring pod pays them a visit. Later, the captive dolphins pay a special visit to a very special guest.

programme.title: We Love Puppies
programme.desc: This hilarious and heart-warming look at everyday life with mans best friend explores the bonds we share with these adorable bundles of fur whether theyre a mutt or a purebred.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: The darkness has arrived and Heimo gets caught miles from home in the wilderness. Plus, the Lewis Family prepares for a life changing event.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: As the end of winter nears, the residents look toward to the future. Bob trains Ruger to be a hunting dog, while Ray prepares for a life without his daughters.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: Sunlight finally returns to the refuge, but Heimo is stopped in his tracks by minus 50 degree temperatures, and the Seldens make their home in a new cabin.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: As the summer fades, the last Alaskans begin their countdown to trapping season. Heimo works to ready a campsite, while Tyler and Ashley hope to stock up on moose meat.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: While Tyler and Ashley trek 15 miles to a lake cabin in search for food., Bob leaves home to see his daughter and assess the damage of his crashed plane.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: A female slow loris has weight problems that stop her from becoming pregnant. Keepers take the penguin colony for a CT scan and an ocopy has pain in his hooves.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: Trust and experience are put to the test when an elephant requires delicate veterinary treatment from her keepers. Endangered pink pigeons need all the help they can get to produce offspring.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: The squirrel monkeys play hard-to-get with the keepers, then a pair of Komodo dragons meet for the first time with explosive results. Meanwhile, the Inca terns prepare for their first big flight.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: The keepers attempt to train Jackson, a golden eagle, for the educational programmes. Plus, the team shares the characteristics of a pack of African wild dogs.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: It's a rough start as the keepers introduce two tigers as potential mates. Then a pair of porcupines arriving at the zoo require delicate handling, and a pregnancy check on a 3,000-pound rhino demands highly specialized equipment.

programme.title: Death At A Funeral
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when a man tries to expose a dark secret regarding a recently deceased patriarch of a dysfunctional British family.

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: A chronicle of John Lennon's first years, focused mainly in his adolescence and his relationship with his stern aunt Mimi, who raised him, and his absentee mother Julia, who re-entered his life at a crucial moment in his young life.

programme.title: The Almond and The Seahorse
programme.desc: What happens when you're ambushed by time? An archaeologist and an architect fight to re-imagine a future after traumatic brain injury leaves them adrift from the people they love.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: The team look into a fatal rollercoaster crash that appears to have been caused by a hacked computer and illegal access to the ride's internal features.

programme.desc: Agent Avery Ryan and her cyber team investigate a roller coaster crash caused by someone who found a way to hack into the ride's internal computer.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: Avery and her team investigate a new cyber threat that allows arsonists a less traceable method of starting fires in homes.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: The Cyber team must track down a bomber fixated on revealing the 'truth' about society's over-reliance on technology.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: Avery and her team investigate the murder of a woman whose electronic devices indicate that she was alive for three days after her official time of death.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: The Cyber team investigates when a high school victim of intense cyberbullying by her classmates pledges to retaliate.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: The cyber team investigates the abductions of young women whose social network pages are being kept up to date. Also, Ryan helps Trish McCarthy cope with the death of Trish's sister, Ryan's former psych patient.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: The cyber crime team investigates when nine planes that departed from the same airport face a co-ordinated wi-fi attack while in flight.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber

programme.title: Csi: Cyber

programme.title: Csi: Cyber

programme.desc: Things get personal when Avery and the team track down the person who hacked into her patient files and released confidential information when she was a behavioural psychologist.

programme.desc: Esther Gonzalez was killed in 1979 while walking in Riverside. Randy Williamson, cleared by polygraph, lived freely until 2014. In 2023, forensic genealogy closed the cold case.

programme.desc: A seemingly random attack leaves Mary Moebus dead, and police with many suspects. Later, a cryptic note leads Kenda to a luxurious bachelor pad with a bedroom soaked in blood.

programme.title: Homicide City

programme.desc: Join Patrick for two hours of spirited debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the issues that matter, with a sharp take on every story.

programme.title: Patrick Christys Tonight Late Edition
programme.desc: Tomorrow's news, tonight. All the major stories making the front pages and full coverage of all the breaking news at home and abroad with Patrick Christys.

programme.title: UK National Anthem
programme.desc: God Save the King' is broadcast each morning at 0559 on GB News - Britain's News Channel.

programme.title: Breakfast with Eamonn and Ellie
programme.desc: Join Eamonn Holmes & Ellie Costello to start your day across the United Kingdom. This is your breakfast show. Join the conversation about what is happening in our nation and the world.

programme.title: Britain's Newsroom
programme.desc: Andrew and Miriam present Monday to Thursday mornings. When the news happens, it happens here. But what does it mean for you? GB News brings you the biggest stories and the answers you need from across the UK.

programme.title: Good Afternoon Britain
programme.desc: Tackling the big stories from all angles and perspectives. Weekdays from midday, Tom Harwood and Emily Carver bring you the most compelling stories from across the United Kingdom.

programme.title: Martin Daubney
programme.desc: Join Martin for an up-to-the-minute take on the day's events delivered in his own unique and lively style.

programme.title: Dewbs & Co
programme.desc: Plain-speaking, straight-talking - Michelle delivers her individual take on the day's news.

programme.title: Farage
programme.desc: Nigel Farage doesn't hold back in his GB News prime-time show. Hear his views and give your own in an action-packed hour of discussion and debate. Join Nigel as he takes on the big stories other media don't want to touch.

programme.desc: Join Jacob for his unique and unmissable take on the day's news.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Abstaining from sex has opposite effects on Elaine and George. Jerry gets bumped from career day at his high school. Kramer opens a smoking lounge.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George squares off against a shipwreck survivor over a new apartment; Jerry attempts to help Newman get a much sought-after transfer to Hawaii.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry bounces a check at a market and the owner puts it up for everyone to see. Jerry soon finds that the owner runs an underground cock fight, so Jerry and Kramer train Kramer's rooster, named Little Jerry, to beat the big rooster.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry buys back a car his parents sold as the Costanzas decide to spend George's inheritance; Kramer can't sleep with his new girlfriend, while Peterman returns unexpectedly.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry discovers he's been duped by a hapless tennis pro, George seeks revenge against a co-worker's cutting remarks; Kramer enlists Elaine's help in drafting a living will.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer gets mugged by a gang, and upon hearing the story, Peterman wants Kramer's life experiences for his own autobiography; everyone seems to object to Jerry's new girlfriend, who he sees as perfect.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine decides to have an alter-ego when a co-worker mistakenly calls her Susie. Susie gets blamed for everything at work and Elaine becomes more popular because she is the only one that ever can find Susie.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry accidentally drops his girlfriend's toothbrush in the toilet and she uses it before he can tell her about it. Not wanting to tell her the truth, Jerry tries to sterilize her mouth and refuses to kiss her.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine keeps getting dragged to see the The English Patient even though she absolutely hates the film. A gorgeous woman mistakes George for her boyfriend, Neil. Jerry takes on The Mandelbaum Boys.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George builds a bed under his desk. Elaine gets a mattress from her back conscious boyfriend. Jerry wrangles an indecisive carpenter, and Kramer takes extreme measures to swim.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George's new flame keeps including "yada yada" in her stories. Jerry is offended by Whatley's Jewish jokes. Elaine tries to help Beth and her new husband adopt a baby. Kramer and Mickey double date.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer prepares for his millennium party, Jerry jockeys for position on his girlfriend's speed dial, Elaine gets irked by an inattentive saleswoman, and George tries to get sacked by The Yankees.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A muffin shop starts selling the tops of muffins, but runs into problems when the muffin bottoms begin to pile up. Kramer tries to get rid of the bottoms for the shop, but is turned down by everyone he offers them to.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer's job at the Tony Awards leads to a meeting with Raquel Welch; George helps Jerry date a high-maintenance woman; Elaine is labeled catty after making a comment about a co-worker.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George lands a job after being mistaken as handicapped. Jerry suspects Bania is using him. Kramer's shaving trick backfires, and Elaine ends a relationship mid flight.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry risks losing a girlfriend over a joke, George continues to work despite having been asked to leave; Elaine finds breaking up is hard to do as Kramer hires an assistant.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George goes to work for his father; Jerry's girlfriend wants to see his emotions; Kramer adopts a suburban feel at home; Elaine prompts two Jewish men to renounce their faith.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry freaks out about receiving three pints of Kramer's blood after a run-in with a knife, Elaine's plan to show responsibility backfires, and George tries to combine his two passions: sex and food.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer asks to stop getting mail. Elaine unwittingly falls for a TV pitchman. An old friend gives Jerry a van. George's parents want to see him less.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer turns his apartment into a talk-show set; Jerry's girlfriend (Julia Pennington) won't let him play with her toys; George's clash with pigeons leads to problems with a squirrel; a new employee's silent movement rattles Elaine.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine borrows Kramer's meat slicer to feed her neighbour's cat, while George tries to hide his not-so-great past from his new boss, and Jerry's revenge date with Pimple Popper MD backfires on him.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry, George and Elaine go to India for a friends wedding. Meanwhile, Kramer stays behind in New York and tries to out wish a friend who wants him to drop dead.

programme.desc: Jerry's girlfriend is naked too often; Elaine's lifestyle offends a co-worker; Kramer seeks to shorten his showers; George has a beef with a new AA member.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Sally Weaver makes fun of Jerry in her one-woman show. Elaine obsesses over a cartoon in The New Yorker. Kramer takes a vow of silence after offending George by saying his girlfriend looks like Jerry.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Kramer hides the keys to his new strong box in Jerry's apartment, George and Elaine each look for ways out of their respective romantic relationships.

programme.desc: Kramer retires and moves next door to Jerry's parents in Florida; Susan's parents catch George in a lie; Elaine can't tell if she's part of an interracial couple.

programme.desc: Kramer and Mickey play ill for med students; Elaine learns that Puddy's religious; George works out how and when to make a good exit; a tractor figures into the past of Jerry's girlfriend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A bookstore busts Uncle Leo for shoplifting and George for bathroom reading; a misdeed at a company party costs Elaine; Kramer and Newman get a rickshaw, and audition homeless people to pull it.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George buys an arcade game to preserve his high score; fear of a serial killer adversely affects Jerry's social life; Elaine eats Peterman's slice of wedding cake from the nuptials of the Duke and Duchess of Windsor.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's area code is changed; a co-worker steals George's desired nickname; Jerry sleeps with his maid; Kramer endures a "long-distance relationship" when his girlfriend moves downtown.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: The gang gets stuck in traffic due to the Puerto Rican Day Parade. George has a laser pointed at him. George, Jerry and Kramer crash an open house.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry, Elaine, George and Kramer plan to go to the movies, but Jerry takes out some time to look back at nine years of memories.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine, George and Kramer attempt to rush Jerry in order to make it to the movie theater on time, while viewers are presented with clips of hysterical and touching moments from more than nine years of laughter-filled memories.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and company are embroiled in a fierce legal battle when they are prosecuted under the Good Samaritan Law, failing to help a pedestrian that was mugged; the new president of NBC calls a meeting with George and Jerry.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jackie Chiles tries to defend the indefensible when Jerry, George, Kramer and Elaine go on trial for violating a Good Samaritan Law, as witnesses are called to testify to the gang's lack of character.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and George finally get the green light to produce "Jerry," the pilot for the series based on their nothing lives; George thinks an actor stole his box of raisins; Kramer is mugged on his way home to use the bathroom.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When Jerry goes to a birthday party with Elaine, he meets a woman he'd like to ask out, but doesn't get the chance to. When she leaves before he gets a chance to find out her name, he and George stakeout her office building.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When Jerry's apartment gets robbed, he decides to move out. George shows him a great apartment, which he plans to take that is, until George expresses his own desire for the apartment.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry finds that trying to end a friendship with Joel, a guy he's known and disliked for years, is harder than breaking up with a woman.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and George invest based on an insider stock tip, but then lose touch with their inside source. A nervous Jerry lets the declining stock ruin his weekend away with Vanessa, while George decides he's all in.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is obsessed with finding a way to break up with his overbearing girlfriend. However, after dispensing his sage advice on the topic, Jerry finds himself in a similar agonising position.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer and Newman scramble for a resolution when the landlord threatens eviction after discovering their reversed peepholes; George mocks Jerry for deciding to no longer carry a wallet in his pocket; Elaine hates Putty's new fur.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Sally Weaver makes fun of Jerry in her one-woman show. Elaine obsesses over a cartoon in The New Yorker. Kramer takes a vow of silence after offending George by saying his girlfriend looks like Jerry.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Kramer hides the keys to his new strong box in Jerry's apartment, George and Elaine each look for ways out of their respective romantic relationships.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer retires and moves next door to Jerry's parents in Florida; Susan's parents catch George in a lie; Elaine can't tell if she's part of an interracial couple.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer and Mickey play ill for med students; Elaine learns that Puddy's religious; George works out how and when to make a good exit; a tractor figures into the past of Jerry's girlfriend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A bookstore busts Uncle Leo for shoplifting and George for bathroom reading; a misdeed at a company party costs Elaine; Kramer and Newman get a rickshaw, and audition homeless people to pull it.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George buys an arcade game to preserve his high score; fear of a serial killer adversely affects Jerry's social life; Elaine eats Peterman's slice of wedding cake from the nuptials of the Duke and Duchess of Windsor.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's area code is changed; a co-worker steals George's desired nickname; Jerry sleeps with his maid; Kramer endures a "long-distance relationship" when his girlfriend moves downtown.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: The gang gets stuck in traffic due to the Puerto Rican Day Parade. George has a laser pointed at him. George, Jerry and Kramer crash an open house.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry, Elaine, George and Kramer plan to go to the movies, but Jerry takes out some time to look back at nine years of memories.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine, George and Kramer attempt to rush Jerry in order to make it to the movie theater on time, while viewers are presented with clips of hysterical and touching moments from more than nine years of laughter-filled memories.

programme.desc: Jerry and company are embroiled in a fierce legal battle when they are prosecuted under the Good Samaritan Law, failing to help a pedestrian that was mugged; the new president of NBC calls a meeting with George and Jerry.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: At a 50th anniversary party, Jerry makes a remark that immigrant children shouldn't ride ponies which offends the guest of honor. When she dies, Jerry has to decide whether to go to a championship softball game or attend her funeral.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While shopping with Elaine, Jerry buys an expensive suede jacket. Elaine convinces George and Jerry to meet her father, who has a reputation of being difficult and intimidating.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George, thinking his girlfriend is ignoring him, leaves nasty messages on her answering machine. But George finds out that she's actually out of town and enlists Jerry's help to switch answering machine tapes.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After Jerry helps Elaine get an apartment in his building, he begins to regret his decision. George starts wearing a wedding ring because he's heard that it helps single guys pick up women.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine talks Jerry into hiring a friend who's working his way through college by cleaning people's homes. When a statue is discovered missing, he suspects the student.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George seeks revenge on his boss after he quits and then tries to get his job back. Jerry and Kramer think a laundromat owner stole money from Jerry.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry tries to decipher an unintelligible note he wrote in the middle of the night. George visits a holistic healer to deal with a medical issue.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and Elaine believe that they have found a foolproof way to start having sex again yet still remain just friends, but they quickly start encountering problems.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer convinces Jerry to get illegal cable. Elaine holds a baby shower for a former girlfriend of George, who he wants revenge against for a callous incident.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry, Elaine and George stop for a quick Chinese meal before seeing Plan 9 From Outer Space, but George needs the payphone he can't have, Jerry needs the name he can't recall, and Elaine needs food.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George accidentally gets a busboy fired. Feeling bad, he tries to make up for the incident but ends up losing the busboy's cat in the process. Meanwhile, Elaine has a houseguest that won't leave.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and Elaine come up with signals so they can help one another get out of bad situations at a party. At the party, George strands Jerry and Elaine at the party when he leaves with a woman, forcing them to call Kramer for a ride.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry scares a massage therapist, while George questions his sexuality after a massage. Kramer insists he saw Joe DiMaggio at a donut shop.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After a tortuous evening with a new girlfriend, George tells her they should stop seeing each other. He then makes the mistake of accommodating her when she insists on hearing the reason.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Hoping they can do some scuba diving, Jerry takes Elaine to Florida where he is appearing at a banquet honouring his father's retirement as president of his condominium association.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry is stuck at home when he gets roped into dog-sitting a rambunctious hound. Without Jerry around, George and Elaine find they have little in common.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry gets a call from the library that he has a book that is 25 years overdue. Jerry thinks back to his childhood and remembers that George borrowed it and never gave it back.

programme.desc: After renting a car, Jerry and his friends spend the day shopping at a New Jersey mall. When they decide to head home so George can meet his parents for their 50th wedding anniversary, no one can remember where they parked the car.

programme.desc: Everyone has an uncommon experience on the subway: Jerry befriends a naked guy, George gets picked up by a stunner, Kramer is tipped to a hot horse, and Elaine gets stuck en route to a wedding.

programme.desc: A Pez dispenser causes George's girlfriend to flub a piano recital. Kramer creates a cologne that smells like the beach. Jerry hosts an intervention.

programme.desc: After a suicide attempt by Jerry's neighbour lands him in a coma, Jerry begins a relationship with his hot girlfriend. George visits a psychic who predicts trouble on his upcoming trip to the Caymans.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry meets Keith Hernandez and wants to make a good impression, but after being introduced to Elaine, Keith breaks his date with Jerry to make one with her; George runs out of time on his unemployment and attempts to stall.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry becomes increasingly jealous of Elaine's relationship with Keith Hernandez. The unemployed George Constanza schemes to collect unemployment checks, while the illustrated JFK "second spitter theory" is further investigated.

programme.desc: George and Jerry take a limo that was supposed to be for a passenger who never made it on the plane and invite Elaine and Kramer to join them.

programme.desc: When Jerry confronts a woman that he saw hit-and-run, he ends up dating her, causing the victim to think Jerry did it. Meanwhile, George sleeps with Elaine's friend and Kramer has bad reactions to Marty Hart's voice.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's new girlfriend gives his friends Elaine, George and Kramer prime VIP seats to a Yankees baseball game. But when the trio is tossed out for a minor altercation, Jerry backs up his friends and calls it quits with the woman.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George damages Jerry's car driving over a pothole, then argues with Kramer's friend about a parking space outside Jerry's place, while Elaine comes up with a wild story about how the accident happened.

programme.desc: Jerry is fed up with Kramer coming into his apartment any time he feels like it and asks him to return his spare set of keys, forcing Kramer to hit the road to California to pursue an acting career.

programme.title: Africa's Claws & Jaws

programme.title: Africa's Claws & Jaws

programme.title: Brazil Untamed

programme.title: Brazil Untamed

programme.title: Brazil Untamed
programme.desc: The Pantanal is the largest tropical wetland on Earth, yet it's also one of the most unforgiving habitats to call home.

programme.title: Rooted
programme.desc: Across rippled dunes, in the wind-swept grasslands of the southern Kalahari towers a magnificent Camelthorn. It has stood here for two centuries. This tree is never lonely, learn how it provides food, shelter and a hunting ground to many...

programme.title: Rooted

programme.title: Animal Empires

programme.title: Land Of Primates

programme.title: BOSAI: Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: Massive logistics facilities underpin online retail, but their robust warehouse structures, state-of-the-art seismic isolation systems and other features make them suitable as evacuation sites too.

programme.title: IMPACTS: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: The key to global warming may lie underground: soil contains far more carbon than the atmosphere, but overdevelopment of farmland releases it as CO2. We explore efforts to capture carbon in the soil.

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.sub-title: AMAMI: Tanaka Isson - Amami's Legendary Painter
programme.desc: Tanaka Isson had a unique gift for portraying Amami Oshima's nature in art. A child prodigy, his career faltered until he moved to the island. Time-lapse footage hints at scenes that inspired him.

programme.desc: Sweet-bean-paste-filled taiyaki in the auspicious shape of a seabream or Tai. The Japanese have loved these sweet treats for over 100 years.

programme.desc: We visit an Edo-style open-air teahouse, where the townspeople enjoyed refreshments, conversation, and the company of exotic birds. For them, these outings were about more than a good time.

programme.title: Japan Railway Journal
programme.sub-title: Battling the Snow: Japan's Northern Railways
programme.desc: In regions that experience heavy snowfall, railways use snowplows in combination with other systems to keep the trains running. See how the railways maintain service in Japan's snow country.

programme.title: Hit the Road 5min
programme.desc: One of the most appealing features of Japan's national road network is the various Michinoeki, literally way stations, that provide a place for motorists to rest, dine and shop.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: Centuries ago, Tokyo was known as EDO. More than a million people enjoyed life in this city, they live on in ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Take a deep dive into ukiyo-e and explore the soul of old Tokyo.

programme.title: GRAND SUMO Highlights
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from March 10, Day 3 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Osaka.

programme.title: CINEMATIC JOURNEY
programme.desc: Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan. Kyle Card hikes the newly designated long trail around majestic Mt. Fuji and discovers its secrets.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: It's late at night, when all are fast asleep. A young man and woman huddle together along the veranda outside of a house, attending to a ... rooster. What could the pair be up to?

programme.title: BOSAI: Science that Can Save Your Life

programme.title: DESIGN MUSEUM JAPAN
programme.desc: Miyamae Yoshiyuki (Fashion designer) visits Kochi. Kochi's Sunday market features around 500 stalls with fixed locations. Miyamae contemplates how communication has contributed to its longevity.

programme.title: KABUKI KOOL
programme.sub-title: The World of Chushingura: The Treasury of Loyal Retainers (Part 2)

programme.title: Saturday Soundtrack

programme.title: Society
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen discovers his parents are part of a gruesome orgy cult for the social elite.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Police Story 2
programme.desc: A dedicated Hong Kong cop's unusual policing methods result in his demotion to traffic duty, despite his success in fighting crime. Meanwhile, an old enemy is released from prison and sets out to get revenge.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: A young woman travels to Las Vegas with the desire to be one of the biggest showgirls on the strip, and plans to stop at nothing to get there, but as she climbs to the top, she realizes that her friendships, morals and soul are on the line.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: In order to get out of the snobby clique that is destroying her good-girl reputation, an intelligent teen teams up with a dark sociopath in a plot to kill the cool kids.

programme.title: Eaten Alive
programme.desc: Psychotic redneck Judd owns a dilapidated hotel in rural East Texas, where he murders people who upset him or his business, and then feeds their remains to his large pet crocodile in the swamp beside his hotel.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: During transport, a group of hardened criminals stages a jailbreak that quickly escalates into a bloody, all-out riot. As the fugitives exact their brutal terror campaign onboard the ship, something even more terrifying emerges from below.

programme.title: Prisoners Of The Ghostland
programme.desc: A wealthy warlord busts a ruthless bank robber out of jail and offers him his freedom in exchange for rescuing his granddaughter, who has gone missing, but the robber must complete the mission while wearing a suit that will detonate in f...

programme.title: Hell House LLC
programme.desc: Five years after an unexplained malfunction causes the death of 15 tour-goers and staff on the opening night of a Halloween haunted house tour, a documentary crew travels back to the scene of the tragedy to find out what really happened.

programme.title: Texas Chainsaw Massacre
programme.desc: Reports of ritual grave desecration and corpse theft draw five close friends into rural Texas to check on a grandfather's gravesite, and while on their way they pick up a crazed hitchhiker and encounter a family of murderous cannibals.

programme.title: The Chaser
programme.desc: A former police officer turned pimp begins searching for missing women who worked for him. He discovers they all visited the same client before disappearing, leading him into a dark and violent hunt.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: Coming Home In The Dark
programme.desc: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In the 17th century, a Jesuit missionary nicknamed Black Robe by the natives and his small party of companions try reaching the Huron tribe in Canada all while facing mistrust, Iroquois warring parties and harsh winter conditions.

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: Set during the time of the first outbreak of bubonic plague in England, a young monk is given the task of learning the truth about reports of people being brought back to life in a small village.

programme.title: District 13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Leito and Damien try their best to restore law and order in the ravaged District 13 that has been ruled by the mafia kings. But intelligence officers from the DISS try to interfere in their operation.

programme.title: Possession
programme.desc: A woman starts exhibiting increasingly disturbing behaviour after asking her husband for a divorce. Suspicions of infidelity soon give way to something much more sinister.

programme.title: Wasabi
programme.desc: When a French policeman is forced to take a leave of absence, he returns to Japan, where he reunites with old friends and attempts to find the reason his estranged girlfriend abandoned him years ago, leading to the discovery of a hidden ...

programme.title: Pusher 3
programme.desc: This bloody and utterly captivating film completes Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy. Copenhagen's biggest king pin must rethink his status when a younger crowd rolls in.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave
programme.desc: An aspiring writer is repeatedly sexually abused, humiliated, and left for dead by four men whom she systematically hunts down to seek revenge, inflicting upon them every horrifying and torturous moment they carried out on her.

programme.title: Audition
programme.desc: A widower accepts his friend's offer to audition girls in order to search for his new wife. However, the girl he likes does not appear to be the one she claims to be.

programme.title: Demonic Toys
programme.desc: They're cute and cuddly by day, lethal demons by night. Toys come alive for just one purpose, death. And for five adults in a toy warehouse, every child's worst nightmare has become a reality.

programme.title: Demonic Toys 2
programme.desc: A group of people on a world wide search for oddities find themselves trapped in a nine hundred year old Italian castle when they accidently unleash the Demonic Toys.

programme.title: Doll Man Vs Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Judith Grey teams with Brick Bardo (Dollman) and his girlfriend Ginger to face the evil Demonic Toys for one final battle.

programme.title: Abre Los Ojos
programme.desc: Cesar is a handsome playboy who has it all until he falls hard for the beautiful Sofia (Penelope Cruz) and a jealous ex involves him in a car accident that disfigures his face.

programme.title: The Last Stop In Yuma County
programme.desc: A traveling knife salesman finds himself stranded and forced to wait at an isolated rest stop. He soon realizes he has wandered into a violent hostage situation upon the arrival of two bank robbers who are on the run after a recent heist.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II
programme.desc: The heroes of the half-shell are back! Our fearsome foursome go after the glowing canister that has slipped into the hands of the evil Shredder and his mutant allies, Rahzar and Tokka.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: China. Chen Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: In silent-era Hollywood, stuntman Roy Walker is brought to a hospital after an on-set accident. There, he befriends a young girl and tells her a fantastical tale of epic heroes taking revenge on an evil ruler.

programme.title: Dust Devil
programme.desc: A woman on the run from her abusive husband encounters a mysterious hitch-hiker.

programme.title: Naked Weapon
programme.desc: Madame M, kidnaps forty pre-teen girls to train them as the most deadly assassins. CIA operative follows the case for 6 years with no leads, but when a series of assassinations begin to occur, he suspects that Madame M is back in business.

programme.title: Cypher
programme.desc: Sci-fi thriller with Jeremy Northam and Lucy Liu. A man takes a job as an industrial spy without understanding the true nature of the role, nor its dangers. Violence/strong language.

programme.title: You Were Never Really Here
programme.desc: A traumatized veteran, unafraid of violence, tracks down missing girls for a living. When a job spins out of control, Joe's nightmares overtake him as a conspiracy is uncovered leading to what may be his death trip or his awakening.

programme.title: Lords Of Chaos
programme.desc: Rory Culkin and Emory Cohen star in this challenging horror thriller based on the rise of Norway's Black Metal music scene in the 1990s. Strong, gory self-harm that may upset/sex.

programme.title: Howling IV: The Original Nightmare
programme.desc: A successful author moves to a small town after suffering a mental breakdown and is tormented by demons and werewolves.

programme.title: Howling V: The Rebirth
programme.desc: A bloody werewolf massacre in 1489 returns 500 years later in 1989 at an old castle. Tourists begin disappearing and are found dead in underground tunnels as a search begins to uncover which of them is the werewolf.

programme.title: Howling VI: The Freaks
programme.desc: A villainous carnival owner traps a young werewolf to include in his growing menagerie of inhuman exhibits.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: A man stranded in the Arctic is finally about to receive his long awaited rescue. However, after a tragic accident, his opportunity is lost. He must decide whether to remain in the relative safety of his camp or to embark on a deadly trek.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: In order to get out of the snobby clique that is destroying her good-girl reputation, an intelligent teen teams up with a dark sociopath in a plot to kill the cool kids.

programme.title: Relaxer
programme.desc: With the impending Y2K apocalypse fast approaching, Abbie is faced with the ultimate challenge - the unbeatable level 256 on Pac-Man - and he can't get off the couch until he conquers it. A survival story set in a living room.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: Japanese teens investigate a series of suicides linked to an internet webcam that promises visitors the chance to interact with the dead.

programme.title: G.I. Samurai
programme.desc: A squadron of Japanese Self-Defence Force soldiers find themselves transported through time to their country's warring states era, when rival samurai clans were battling to become the supreme Shogun.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman must protect a female witness from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work. Jackie Chan and Brigitte Lin star.

programme.title: Police Story 2
programme.desc: A dedicated Hong Kong cop's unusual policing methods result in his demotion to traffic duty, despite his success in fighting crime. Meanwhile, an old enemy is released from prison and sets out to get revenge.

programme.title: Police Story 3: Super Cop
programme.desc: Jackie Chan, Michelle Yeoh, and Maggie Cheung lead an action-packed classic with jaw-dropping stunts, from leaping out a ten-story building onto an airborne helicopter to landing on top of a speeding train.

programme.title: The Parts You Lose
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship unfolds between a young deaf boy, Wesley, and a fugitive criminal who takes refuge in an abandoned barn on the familys rural North Dakota farm.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: After being forced to drive a mysterious passenger at gunpoint, a man finds himself in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse where it becomes clear that not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: Ten years after Willie Parker ratted on his old mobster friends in exchange for personal immunity, two hit men kidnap him and drive him to Paris for his planned execution. However, they encounter many mishaps along the way.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: An evil presence stalks a woman alone on the American frontier in this acclaimed western-horror.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: A bonding weekend goes horribly wrong for seven colleagues who find themselves facing the chop when they are sabotaged by a deadly enemy. Only the smartest will survive this brutal office outing.

programme.title: District 13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: Lars And The Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars Lindstrom is an akwardly shy young man in a small town who finally brings home the girl of his dreams to his brother and sister-in-law's home. The only problem is that she's not real - she's a sex doll.

programme.title: Night Of The Living Dead (1968)
programme.desc: Seven strangers hide from a horde of reanimated corpses inside a rural Pennsylvania farmhouse. Terror escalates and tensions rise as the group struggles to ward off the flesh-eating ghouls.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: A lonely, bullied middle school student who is viewed as an outcast "weirdo" harbors a dark secret: at night, in the forest, she slays giants.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: A group of friends trek into the Amazon jungle with a guide who has a mysterious past. Their journey quickly turns into a terrifying ordeal as the deadliest threats of the wilderness lead to an all-out fight for survival.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Border Security: America's Front Line
programme.desc: Canines in Chicago sniff out cash; a Canadian vehicle is seedy; officers discover a traveller's alter ego; officers sift through suspicious leaves.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: Cameras join officers from Australia's airports, harbours and mail services as they protect the nation from drug-smugglers, illegal products and unusual creepy-crawlies.

programme.title: Police Ten 7
programme.desc: Two Constables are called to Foodtown Grey Lynn, where a male has been caught stealing, putting a pack of sausages down his pants, and emptying wine bottles into juice bottles.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: An officer's patience is tested well beyond his limits when he catches an extremely drunk driver. A driver going hellishly fast smashes into a young woman, then does a runner from the scene. Officers meet a man who has made up his own ro...

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: The driver of a car with a loud exhaust admits he panicked and ran. A woman caught riding a stolen moped claims she borrowed it. A man is caught with a tool for deactivating security tags.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them; both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence; a 12-year friendship is jeopardised when a woman suspects her roommate of stealing.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A suspect harbours drugs in his mouth during questioning. An officer responds to a tenant and landlord dispute. A mother is reunited with her child. A wellness check is conducted on an intoxicated man.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A traffic violator further implicates himself. A drug bust turns into a slow speed pursuit. A counter drug initiative proves effective. A domestic call results in an emotional parental scolding.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Riding in high performance patrol cars, on the ground with the dog team and busting down doors of dealers, the documentary footage puts you in the thick of the action.

programme.title: Motorway Cops
programme.desc: With three million dashcams now in vehicles, a look at some of Britain's worst driving offenders.

programme.title: Code 1: Extreme
programme.desc: The crew respond to a man with serious brain injuries after a car and truck collide. A mountain biker suffers multiple fractures & a pensioner is found face down in water.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Featuring police officers in cities across the US, patrolling streets for car thieves, drug pushers, sex-trade workers, violent thugs and anyone else who dares step onto the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a husband and wife are washed off rocks by a massive wave. The lifeguards search desperately for the couple, hoping that the rescue mission doesn't become a body retrieval.

programme.sub-title: Winner Winner Chicken Dinner!/Those Are Not My Texts!
programme.desc: A gambler wins a week-long cruise, but ends up choosing the wrong travelling companions; a woman says her former friend is fabricating texts regarding the collection of a debt, so Judge Judy rules on the matter in her court of law.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman accuses the ex-lover of her current boyfriend of ramming her car numerous times, kicking it and then harassing her.

programme.title: Judge Judy

programme.desc: Follow the work of US Customs and Border Protection officers as they clear travellers at land, air, and sea, inspecting cargo for weapons, contraband, and illegal travellers to secure America's borders.

programme.title: Judge Judy

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A man alerts authorities about a deadly act of self defence. A flagrant driver tries an amusing excuse. A recovering drug addict admits to possession. Two men are busted red-handed amidst a drug deal.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A suspect harbours drugs in his mouth during questioning. An officer responds to a tenant and landlord dispute. A mother is reunited with her child. A wellness check is conducted on an intoxicated man.

programme.title: Outlander

programme.desc: As the clan prepares for an important gathering, Claire plots an escape from the castle. New tensions surface between Jamie and Dougal.

programme.desc: Claire joins the MacKenzie rent-collecting party on the road. To her horror, Dougal uses Jamie's scarred back to gain sympathy for the Jacobite cause. Claire remembers that a defining moment in Scottish history is fast approaching.

programme.desc: Claires unexpected meeting with a British General turns tense when Captain Jack Randall joins her and the officers for lunch.

programme.desc: Marriage to a Scot seems to be the only legal way out to save Claire from falling into the paws of Black Jack Randall.
